context.audience: Developers containerizing web applications for consistent deployment, DevOps engineers building container orchestration workflows, teams adopting Docker for local development and CI/CD
pain_points: Writing efficient Dockerfiles that produce small, secure images
Multi-stage builds and layer caching for fast CI/CD pipelines
Docker Compose vs Kubernetes for small to medium team deployments
Container security scanning and vulnerability management
Local development workflow with Docker that doesn't slow down hot reload
